## RateLimitWindowConfig

<GenerationInfo sourceFile="packages/ratelimit/src/types.ts" sourceLine="178" packageName="@commandkit/ratelimit" />

Per-window overrides when a limiter defines multiple windows.

```ts title="Signature"
interface RateLimitWindowConfig {
    id?: string;
    maxRequests?: number;
    interval?: DurationLike;
    algorithm?: RateLimitAlgorithmType;
    burst?: number;
    refillRate?: number;
    leakRate?: number;
    violations?: ViolationOptions;
}
```
